title: Dragon Cosmetics
description: Dragon Themed Addon for Custom Cosmetics
body:
# Dragon Cosmetics  
This resourcepack adds various dragon wings, as well as making use of the new trims feature to allow for color customization of the wing layers!

Dragon wings replace your Elytra/Cape Texture!  
_Custom Cosmetics 4.1 and above only_
## What To Expect  
![UnTrimmed Dragon Wings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c13eb19d11591d6452c5635810e8f29c8bb0f2.png)
Check out the Gallery for all currently added trims!  
## How To Use  
Run ```/cosmetics inject all```, ```/cosmetics inject resourcepack PACKNAME```, or manually add the info from configdata into your server cosmetics file!

_Ensure you use the correct resourcepack for the mod version_
